title: Raccoon Removal Astoria, Queens | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Astoria, Queens. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Same-day service available. Call now for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Astoria, attracted to the neighborhood's mix of residential homes, garden apartments, and easy access to food sources near Astoria Park and the waterfront. These intelligent animals can cause significant damage to roofs, attics, and crawl spaces while posing health risks to your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, humane raccoon removal services throughout Astoria and surrounding Queens neighborhoods.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians have over 15 years of experience handling raccoon infestations in Astoria's diverse housing stock, from pre-war walk-ups to modern condos. We use proven humane trapping methods, provide full attic restoration, and offer same-day emergency service with upfront pricing and a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Astoria's tree-lined streets, proximity to Astoria Park, and abundance of older buildings with accessible roof lines make it prime territory for raccoon activity. We've successfully served homeowners and property managers throughout the neighborhood, from Ditmars Boulevard down to the Queensboro Bridge area, protecting both single-family homes and multi-unit buildings.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Astoria?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Astoria typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring sealing, and any attic damage or cleanup needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Astoria, Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Astoria due to the neighborhood's abundant food sources, mature trees, proximity to Astoria Park and the waterfront, and older buildings that provide easy roof and attic access. They're particularly active in spring and fall.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Astoria property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Astoria for urgent situations. Most raccoon removal projects take 3-7 days depending on the number of animals and whether babies are present. We'll assess your specific situation during the initial inspection and provide a clear timeline.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Astoria?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-capture trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Raccoons are safely relocated, and we never use poison or harmful techniques. We also provide exclusion services to prevent future intrusions and can perform attic restoration if needed.
